prospect_frstnm: Uncertain; likely first name but samples appear encrypted or obfuscated.
prospect_ntwrth: Net worth of the prospect in dollars.
prospect_mplr: Multiplexer or possibly a company associated with the prospect.
prospect_nmbrcrdtcrds: Number of credit cards held by the prospect.
prospect_lstnm: Uncertain; likely last name but samples appear encrypted or obfuscated.
prospect_ddrssln2: Uncertain; possibly a second address line but samples appear encrypted or obfuscated.
prospect_mrtlstts: Marital status of the prospect (U=Unknown, S=Single, M=Married).
prospect_nmbrchldrn: Number of children the prospect has.
prospect_cntr: Country of residence for the prospect.
prospect_nmbrcrs: Number of cars owned by the prospect.
prospect_ncm: Postal or zip code of the prospect's residence.
prospect_crdtrtng: Credit rating score of the prospect.
prospect_wnrrntflg: Ownership or rental status flag of the prospect.
